gist.headline: Looking through the Labol Lens
gist.blurb: A brand new community app just sprouted in the greenhouse! Check out Labol Lens, the latest creation built on our image generation API.
gist.summary: Added the community-built 'Labol Lens' application to the Pollinations app showcase and greenhouse.
gist.impact: Users can now discover and explore the Labol Lens app directly from our community directory.
gist.visual_concept: The PR adds an app called 'Labol Lens' to the Greenhouse directory. The visual should feature Polly the bee in a cozy greenhouse setting, looking through a magnifying glass or camera lens at a glowing pixel-art flower or image, representing the new 'lens' app.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing a tiny explorer's hat, looking through a glowing magnifying glass at a sprouting code-plant inside a warm greenhouse. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel peach gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
